message:
feat(abi): prewarm host pthread symbols at startup and publish environment globals

pthread_abi: Add prewarm_host_thread_symbols() that eagerly resolves
all 20+ host pthread function pointers during bootstrap passthrough,
avoiding lazy dlvsym resolution through validated membrane paths once
runtime is active.

startup_abi: Extract init_environment_globals() to publish envp into
glibc-compatible __environ/_environ/environ aliases. Consolidate
init_program_name + init_environment_globals into init_process_globals
helper. Wire prewarm + signal_runtime_ready into the host delegate
main wrapper. Publish __progname_full from argv[0]. Call
init_process_globals in delegate_to_host_libc_start_main before
storing the delegated main pointer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
